::: {#js_content .rich_media_content .js_underline_content .autoTypeSetting24psection}
::: {.section data-tool="mdnice编辑器" data-website="https://www.mdnice.com" style="margin:0px;padding:0px 10px;background:none 0% 0%/auto no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box rgba(0,0,0,0);width:auto;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light;font-size:16px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.25;word-spacing:0em;letter-spacing:2px;word-break:break-word;overflow-wrap:break-word;text-align:left;visibility:visible" data-pm-slice="0 0 []"}
[近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）在文本生成、对话系统等领域展现出强大能力，但它们有一个天生的短板：无法直接与现实世界互动。比如，你无法让一个LLM直接查询天气预报或预订机票，除非它能够调用外部工具（如API）。这种"工具增强"的能力让LLM从"纸上谈兵"升级为"实干家"，成为当前研究的热点。]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}

[然而，现有的工具调用框架（如ReAct）在处理简单任务时表现不错，一旦面对复杂任务------比如需要多个工具协同工作、步骤之间有依赖关系的情况------就显得力不从心。它们像是一个"走一步看一步"的导航系统，容易陷入局部最优，找不到全局最佳路径。]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}

![](data:image/webp;base64,){.rich_pages .wxw-img}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible"}
    [论文：Beyond ReAct: A Planner-Centric Framework for Complex Tool-Augmented LLM Reasoning]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal;visibility:visible"}
    [链接：https://arxiv.org/pdf/2511.10037]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}
    :::

[本文提出了一种全新的思路：将"规划"与"执行"分离，引入一个专门的"规划器"（Planner），负责在任务开始前就制定出一个全局执行计划，这个计划以"有向无环图"（DAG）的形式呈现，清晰标出工具之间的依赖关系。此外，作者还构建了一个大规模基准数据集ComplexTool-Plan，并设计了一套两阶段训练方法（SFT + GRPO），显著提升了模型在复杂任务中的表现。实验表明，该框架在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，同时执行效率更高。]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}

[]{data-cacheurl="" data-remoteid="" style="background:url(data:image/webp;base64,)0% 0%/15px 15px no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box transparent;width:15px;height:15px;align-items:unset;border-style:none;border-width:1px;border-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;color:rgb(0,0,0);display:inline-block;font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;justify-content:unset;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:1.5em;margin:0px 0px -2px;overflow:unset;padding:0px;text-align:left;text-indent:0em;text-shadow:none;transform:none;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;visibility:visible" data-lazy-bgimg="https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/gKaxjIx6baiaFXHgO8VQt4JaiaIBib5oDq6MMGKwTpVmC6KAiccnr58yqYdFwZ7EMg6p7uGwgJ24k7ia12OrYXOxSuQ/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg" data-fail="0"}[]{style="display:none"}[[研究动机与问题定义]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}]{style="font-size:17px;color:rgb(43,43,43);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;align-items:unset;background:none 0% 0%/auto no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box transparent;border-style:none;border-width:1px;border-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:inline-block;font-weight:bold;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;margin:0px 0px 0px 8px;overflow:unset;padding:0px;text-align:left;text-indent:0em;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;visibility:visible"}[]{style="display:none"} {#研究动机与问题定义 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="padding:0px;align-items:unset;background:none 0% 0%/auto no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box transparent;border-style:none;border-width:1px;border-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:block;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;line-height:1.5em;overflow:unset;text-align:left;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;margin:20px 10px 0px 0px;visibility:visible"}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[为什么需要"超越ReAct"？]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}**[\
]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}[ReAct是一种典型的"反应式"框架，模型在每一步决定下一步该调用什么工具。这种方式在简单任务中有效，但在复杂任务中容易"只见树木不见森林"。例如，如果任务需要先查询A工具的结果，再根据结果选择调用B或C工具，ReAct可能会在某个步骤选错工具，导致后续全盘皆输。这就是所谓的"局部优化陷阱"。]{leaf="" style="visibility:visible"}

**[复杂任务的挑战]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[复杂任务通常涉及多个工具，且工具之间存在复杂的依赖关系。例如，"查询北京明天天气，如果下雨就推荐室内活动，否则推荐户外景点"需要调用天气API、活动推荐API等，并且步骤之间有条件判断。这种任务天然适合用DAG来表示，其中节点是工具，边是依赖关系。]{leaf=""}

**[问题形式化]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[作者将任务规划定义为一个"结构化预测问题"：给定用户查询 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" Q "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" Q "}[ 和工具集 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" T "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" T "}[，模型需要生成一个DAG执行计划 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" G = (V, E) "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" G = (V, E) "}[，其中 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" V "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" V "}[ 是选中的工具，]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" E "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" E "}[ 是工具之间的依赖边。目标是训练一个模型 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" M_\theta "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" M_\theta "}[，使其生成的计划 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" G "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" G "}[ 的效用 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" U(G) "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" U(G) "}[ 最大化。]{leaf=""}

[]{.wx_imgbc_placeholder data-cacheurl="" data-remoteid="" style="background:url(data:image/gif;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVQImWNgYGBgAAAABQABh6FO1AAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==)0% 0%/15px 15px no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box transparent;width:15px;height:15px;align-items:unset;border-style:none;border-width:1px;border-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;color:rgb(0,0,0);display:inline-block;font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;justify-content:unset;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:1.5em;margin:0px 0px -2px;overflow:unset;padding:0px;text-align:left;text-indent:0em;text-shadow:none;transform:none;-webkit-box-reflect:unset" data-lazy-bgimg="https://mmbiz.qpic.cn/mmbiz_png/gKaxjIx6baiaFXHgO8VQt4JaiaIBib5oDq6MMGKwTpVmC6KAiccnr58yqYdFwZ7EMg6p7uGwgJ24k7ia12OrYXOxSuQ/640?wx_fmt=png&from=appmsg"}[]{style="display:none"}[[方法论详解]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:17px;color:rgb(43,43,43);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;align-items:unset;background-attachment:scroll;background-clip:border-box;background-color:transparent;background-image:none;background-origin:padding-box;background-position-x:0%;background-position-y:0%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:auto;border-top-style:none;border-bottom-style:none;border-left-style:none;border-right-style:none;border-top-width:1px;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:1px;border-right-width:1px;border-top-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-left-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-right-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;border-bottom-left-radius:0px;border-bottom-right-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:inline-block;font-weight:bold;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;margin-top:0px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:8px;margin-right:0px;overflow-x:unset;overflow-y:unset;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;text-align:left;text-indent:0em;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset"}[]{style="display:none"} {#方法论详解 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;align-items:unset;background-attachment:scroll;background-clip:border-box;background-color:transparent;background-image:none;background-origin:padding-box;background-position-x:0%;background-position-y:0%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:auto;border-top-style:none;border-bottom-style:none;border-left-style:none;border-right-style:none;border-top-width:1px;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:1px;border-right-width:1px;border-top-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-left-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-right-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;border-bottom-left-radius:0px;border-bottom-right-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:block;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;line-height:1.5em;overflow-x:unset;overflow-y:unset;text-align:left;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;margin-top:20px;margin-right:10px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:0px"}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### []{style="display:none"}[[整体框架：Plan-Execute范式]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#整体框架plan-execute范式 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

[本文框架的核心是将规划与执行分离：]{leaf=""}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[Planner]{leaf=""}**[：负责将用户查询转换为DAG计划。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[Executor]{leaf=""}**[：按照DAG顺序并行执行工具调用。]{leaf=""}
    :::

[这种设计使得Planner可以专注于全局优化，而不被执行细节干扰。]{leaf=""}

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder}

#### []{style="display:none"}[[ComplexTool-Plan基准构建]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#complextool-plan基准构建 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

[由于缺乏训练数据，作者设计了一个三阶段自动化流程来生成高质量的训练数据：]{leaf=""}

1.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[工作流生成]{leaf=""}**[：使用强LLM（如DeepSeek-V3）根据工具库生成复杂DAG计划。]{leaf=""}
    :::

2.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[查询逆向工程]{leaf=""}**[：根据生成的DAG，反向推导出用户可能提出的自然语言查询。]{leaf=""}
    :::

3.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[意图分析与重规划]{leaf=""}**[：对查询进行再规划，确保生成的DAG与原始意图一致，保证数据质量。]{leaf=""}
    :::

#### []{style="display:none"}[[两阶段训练方法]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#两阶段训练方法 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
**[监督微调（SFT）]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[使用生成的训练数据 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" D_{\text{train}} "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" D_{\text{train}} "}[ 对模型进行初始化，最小化负对数似然损失：]{leaf=""}

[]{style="cursor:pointer"}

::: {.section data-formula="\mathcal{L}_{\text{SFT}}(\theta) = -\mathbb{E}_{(Q,G_{gt})\sim D_{\text{train}}}[\log P(G_{gt}|Q,T;\theta)]
" style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light;text-align:center;overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:auto;display:block"}
:::

[这里，]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" G_{gt} "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" G_{gt} "}[ 是真实DAG，模型学习如何根据查询 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" Q "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" Q "}[ 和工具集 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" T "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" T "}[ 生成正确计划。]{leaf=""}
:::

::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
**[强化学习（GRPO）]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[SFT后，作者使用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）进行策略优化。关键在于设计了一个]{leaf=""}**[分层奖励函数]{leaf=""}**[[]{data-formula=" R(y) "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" R(y) "}[，对生成计划 ]{leaf=""}[[]{data-formula=" y "}]{style="cursor:pointer" data-formula=" y "}[ 进行多维度评估：]{leaf=""}

[]{style="cursor:pointer"}

::: {.section data-formula="R(y) = \begin{cases} 
P_{\text{syntax}}(y) = -10.0 & \text{if 语法错误} \\
P_{\text{cycle}}(y) = -10.0 & \text{else if 存在环} \\
P_{\text{connectivity}}(y) = -2.0 & \text{else if 节点不连通} \\
R_{F1}(y) + R_{\text{bonus}}(y) & \text{otherwise}
\end{cases}
" style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light;text-align:center;overflow-x:auto;overflow-y:auto;display:block"}
语法错误存在环节点不连通
:::

[其中：]{leaf=""}

[这个函数像一个"严格考官"，先检查致命错误（如循环依赖），再评估细节正确性。]{leaf=""}
:::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    [：奖励边级别的结构正确性。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    [：如果计划与真实DAG完全一致，给予额外奖励。]{leaf=""}
    :::

[]{.wx_imgbc_placeholder data-cacheurl="" data-remoteid="" style="background:url(data:image/gif;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAADUlEQVQImWNgYGBgAAAABQABh6FO1AAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==)0% 0%/15px 15px no-repeat scroll padding-box border-box transparent;width:15px;height:15px;align-items:unset;border-style:none;border-width:1px;border-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;color:rgb(0,0,0);display:inline-block;font-size:22px;font-weight:bold;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;justify-content:unset;letter-spacing:0px;line-height:1.5em;margin:0px 0px -2px;overflow:unset;padding:0px;text-align:left;text-indent:0em;text-shadow:none;transform:none;-webkit-box-reflect:unset" {#实验设计与结果分析 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;align-items:unset;background-attachment:scroll;background-clip:border-box;background-color:transparent;background-image:none;background-origin:padding-box;background-position-x:0%;background-position-y:0%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:auto;border-top-style:none;border-bottom-style:none;border-left-style:none;border-right-style:none;border-top-width:1px;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:1px;border-right-width:1px;border-top-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-left-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-right-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;border-bottom-left-radius:0px;border-bottom-right-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:block;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;line-height:1.5em;overflow-x:unset;overflow-y:unset;text-align:left;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;margin-top:20px;margin-right:10px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:0px"}
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### []{style="display:none"}[[数据集介绍]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#数据集介绍 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[ComplexTool-Plan]{leaf=""}**[：包含4,535个工具API，任务分为Easy/Medium/Hard三个难度级别。Hard任务工具选择更多，依赖更复杂。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[StableToolBench]{leaf=""}**[：用于端到端评估，测试模型在真实场景中的工具调用能力。]{leaf=""}
    :::

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder width="80%"}

#### []{style="display:none"}[[基线方法]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#基线方法 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[专有模型]{leaf=""}**[：GPT-4o、Claude-3.7等，直接生成DAG计划。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[开源框架]{leaf=""}**[：ReAct、DFSDT、LLMCompiler等。]{leaf=""}
    :::

#### []{style="display:none"}[[评估指标]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#评估指标 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[节点级性能]{leaf=""}**[：工具选择的准确率、召回率、F1分数。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[边级性能]{leaf=""}**[：依赖关系预测的准确率。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[DAG精确匹配（EM）]{leaf=""}**[：整个DAG是否完全正确。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[端到端指标]{leaf=""}**[：任务解决率（SoPR）和胜率（SoWR）。]{leaf=""}
    :::

#### []{style="display:none"}[[关键结果]{leaf=""}]{style="font-size:14px;color:rgb(0,0,0);line-height:1.5em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:bold;display:block;border-bottom-width:2px;border-bottom-style:solid;border-bottom-color:initial"}[]{style="display:none"} {#关键结果 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="margin-top:30px;margin-bottom:15px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;display:block"}

**[RQ1：RL是否比SFT更强？]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[是的。在Hard任务上，Qwen3-8B模型的DAG精确匹配从SFT的0.295提升到SFT+RL的0.319，相对提升8.1%。RL能纠正SFT难以捕捉的结构错误。]{leaf=""}

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder}

**[RQ2：模型越大越好吗？]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[是的。模型规模与性能正相关，且大模型在复杂任务中表现更稳健。例如，从Easy到Hard任务，Qwen3-8B的准确率下降60.3%，而Qwen3-1.7B下降71.2%。]{leaf=""}

**[RQ3：端到端效果和效率如何？]{leaf=""}**

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[效果]{leaf=""}**[：Qwen3-8B在StableToolBench上平均SoPR达59.8%，超过GPT-4（ReAct）的48.2%。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    **[效率]{leaf=""}**[：平均仅需2.29步完成任务，优于其他方法（如DTA-Llama的2.48步）。]{leaf=""}
    :::

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder}

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder width="70%"}

{#讨论与创新点总结 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;align-items:unset;background-attachment:scroll;background-clip:border-box;background-color:transparent;background-image:none;background-origin:padding-box;background-position-x:0%;background-position-y:0%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:auto;border-top-style:none;border-bottom-style:none;border-left-style:none;border-right-style:none;border-top-width:1px;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:1px;border-right-width:1px;border-top-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-left-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-right-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;border-bottom-left-radius:0px;border-bottom-right-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:block;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;line-height:1.5em;overflow-x:unset;overflow-y:unset;text-align:left;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;margin-top:20px;margin-right:10px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:0px"}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[创新点]{leaf=""}**

1.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[全局规划取代局部优化]{leaf=""}**[：通过DAG计划避免ReAct的"短视"行为。]{leaf=""}
    :::

2.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[并行化潜力]{leaf=""}**[：DAG中无依赖的工具可以并行执行，提升效率。]{leaf=""}
    :::

3.  ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:14px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-align:justify;font-weight:normal;font-family:Optima-Regular,Optima,PingFangTC-Light,PingFangSC-light,PingFangTC-light"}
    **[高质量基准与训练方法]{leaf=""}**[：ComplexTool-Plan填补了复杂规划评估的空白，SFT+GRPO训练策略系统化提升模型能力。]{leaf=""}
    :::

**[实际价值]{leaf=""}**[\
]{leaf=""}[该框架适用于需要多工具协同的复杂场景，如智能客服、自动化工作流、多模态任务处理等。其高效性使其在资源受限环境中也具有应用潜力。]{leaf=""}

**[局限性]{leaf=""}**

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    [非迭代设计：一旦计划错误，无法中途修正。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    [对Planner模型容量要求高，小模型容易"奖励黑客"（只避免惩罚而不真正解决问题）。]{leaf=""}
    :::

{#结论与未来展望 data-tool="mdnice编辑器" style="padding-top:0px;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;align-items:unset;background-attachment:scroll;background-clip:border-box;background-color:transparent;background-image:none;background-origin:padding-box;background-position-x:0%;background-position-y:0%;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-size:auto;border-top-style:none;border-bottom-style:none;border-left-style:none;border-right-style:none;border-top-width:1px;border-bottom-width:1px;border-left-width:1px;border-right-width:1px;border-top-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-bottom-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-left-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-right-color:rgb(0,0,0);border-top-left-radius:0px;border-top-right-radius:0px;border-bottom-left-radius:0px;border-bottom-right-radius:0px;box-shadow:none;display:block;flex-direction:unset;float:unset;height:auto;justify-content:unset;line-height:1.5em;overflow-x:unset;overflow-y:unset;text-align:left;text-shadow:none;transform:none;width:auto;-webkit-box-reflect:unset;margin-top:20px;margin-right:10px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:0px"}
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[本文提出了一种以Planner为中心的工具增强LLM框架，通过DAG全局规划、ComplexTool-Plan基准和SFT+GRPO训练方法，显著提升了复杂任务的处理能力。实验证明，该框架在规划质量和端到端效率上均达到最先进水平。]{leaf=""}

[未来工作可能包括：]{leaf=""}

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    [引入迭代机制，允许Planner根据执行反馈调整计划。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    [扩展至多模态任务，如图像、语音工具的组合调用。]{leaf=""}
    :::

-   ::: {.section style="margin-top:5px;margin-bottom:5px;color:rgb(1,1,1);font-size:13px;line-height:1.8em;letter-spacing:0em;text-align:left;font-weight:normal"}
    [探索更轻量化的Planner模型，降低部署成本。]{leaf=""}
    :::
:::

[![图片](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder}]{leaf=""}

[\
]{leaf=""}

[![图片](data:image/svg+xml,%3C%3Fxml%20version='1.0'%20encoding='UTF-8'%3F%3E%3Csvg%20width='1px'%20height='1px'%20viewBox='0%200%201%201'%20version='1.1'%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink'%3E%3Ctitle%3E%3C/title%3E%3Cg%20stroke='none'%20stroke-width='1'%20fill='none'%20fill-rule='evenodd'%20fill-opacity='0'%3E%3Cg%20transform='translate(-249.000000,%20-126.000000)'%20fill='%23FFFFFF'%3E%3Crect%20x='249'%20y='126'%20width='1'%20height='1'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E){.rich_pages .wxw-img .js_img_placeholder .wx_img_placeholder}]{leaf=""}
